sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97002" key="stomi/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στομίας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, ὁ</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἵππος</foreign>),= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στόμις</foreign> (q.v.), <sense id="n97002.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard-mouthed horse</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2956.tlg002:p.21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Afric.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Cest.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.21</biblScope> </bibl> V., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
